intentSynonyms: check user rbac permissions in amplitude
check whether the current user has specific rbac permissions in amplitude
description: Check whether the current user has specific RBAC permissions. Common actions include: INVITE_NEW_USERS, VIEW_PROJECT_LIST, UPDATE_COHORT, CREATE_FEATURE_EXPERIMENT, AI_VIEW_GLOBAL_AGENT, AI_CREATE_GLOBAL_AGENT, UPDATE_BILLING_METHOD, READ_ACCESS_EXPERIMENT.

app_ids.description: App/project IDs to scope the permission check to (optional)
